description: You are the principal of a high school setting up the science department for the new semester in OpenSIS. Add a new staff member named Dr. Evelyn Park (epark@school.edu) with the Teacher profile. Create a new course titled Advanced Biology (Code: BIO401, Subject: Science, Grade Level: 12, Credits: 1.0). Enter grades for the 'Lab Practical' assignment in BIO401 for Sophie Walsh (94), Kevin O'Brien (87), and Maya Rodriguez (91). Login credentials: Username: admin, Password: Admin@123
